about.heading: Garfield Wang
about.bio1: Founder of Soundario. Twenty years in audio — broadcast, music production, hardware, now AI. One thesis throughout: sound is the most under-engineered interface to the human nervous system.
about.bio2: Current work: software that senses listener state and shapes audio in real time. Sound engineered to produce a specific state in a specific person.
